The branch adds a core doctor health check and normal doctor contribution for malformed static provider catalog projection, with focused tests and a comment keeping runtime projection on the typed catalog contract.

PR surface: Source +529, Tests +606. Total +1135 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: no. executed high-confidence current-main repro was run in this read-only review. The source path is clear: current projection directly iterates provider catalog rows, and the PR adds focused tests for malformed shapes that would otherwise reach that projection boundary.

target.title: fix(doctor): diagnose malformed provider catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- moves malformed static provider catalog handling out of runtime projection and into `openclaw doctor`
- keeps unified text provider catalog projection on the typed provider catalog contract instead of carrying fallback/skip semantics in core runtime code
- adds the `core/doctor/provider-catalog-projection` health check for full provider registrations
- reports malformed provider containers, provider entries, model lists, model row iteration failures, unreadable rows, invalid provider/model keys, invalid static catalog order/hooks, and proxy/access errors from static catalog hooks

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-conversion-plan.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-entry.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/plugins/provider-catalog-unified-text.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-conversion-plan.ts src/flows/doctor-health-conversion-plan.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/plugins/provider-catalog-unified-text.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:test`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --prompt-file /tmp/provider-catalog-doctor-review-context.txt`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: malformed static provider catalog output is diagnosed by doctor instead of adding runtime fallback/tolerance to unified text provider catalog projection.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on branch head `cf2d4fe3561ff049eda3a3fc4e1f1d1f3fcc472a`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran focused Vitest suites for doctor health checks, doctor contributions, conversion-plan wiring, and provider-entry projection coverage; ran formatter, targeted lint, test typecheck, diff whitespace check, and autoreview.

Evidence after fix: tests cover full provider registrations, invalid provider containers, falsy malformed results, invalid or missing `models`, invalid model iterators, unreadable provider/model rows, invalid provider keys, invalid model ids/names, invalid static catalog order/hooks, revoked proxy handling, static catalog hook failures, and doctor contribution rendering.

Observed result after fix: `openclaw doctor` health check paths report actionable malformed provider catalog findings while runtime projection keeps the typed provider catalog contract.

What was not tested: no live provider/network catalog calls; scoped to static provider catalog validation.
target.author: vincentkoc
